skills.name: vlocity-architecture-mapper
skills.description: Traces OmniStudio dependency chains (OmniScripts → Integration Procedures → DataRaptors) and generates architecture documentation.

skills.name: vlocity-dependency-indexer
skills.description: Builds and maintains pre-computed dependency indices for Vlocity/OmniStudio metadata. Supports full init scan, git-delta incremental updates, deep recursive element traversal, and journey documentation generation.

skills.name: vlocity-datapack-reviewer
skills.description: Static analysis on Vlocity DataPacks (OmniScripts, IPs, DataRaptors) to identify architectural risks, performance bottlenecks, and hardcoded values.

skills.name: vlocity-impact-analyzer
skills.description: Intelligent change impact analysis for OmniStudio/Vlocity components. Determines blast radius, loads pre-computed documentation from vlocity-dependency-indexer, and provides LLM-driven analysis of upstream callers and downstream dependencies.

skills.name: vlocity-generator
skills.description: Generates and modifies Vlocity/OmniStudio DataPack JSON files (DataRaptors, Integration Procedures) using schema-aware templates. Supports managed package and native OmniStudio schemas.

skills.name: vlocity-tester
skills.description: Tests deployed Vlocity DataRaptors and Integration Procedures via Salesforce REST API. Supports managed package and native OmniStudio endpoints.

skills.name: vlocity-flexcard-helper
skills.description: Parses, structures, and validates complex FlexCard and OmniScript visual component metadata. Helps compile client-side LWCs and prepare visual validation.
